samples.desc: again — short whistle, quick tweet

samples.desc: medium whistle — about one second, single steady pitch

samples.desc: another medium whistle, one second steady

samples.name: pos-long-01
samples.desc: long sustained whistle — hold for two to three seconds, single pitch

samples.desc: another long sustained whistle, two to three seconds

samples.desc: one more long sustained whistle

samples.name: pos-rising-01
samples.desc: two-tone whistle going up in pitch — low, then high

samples.name: pos-rising-02
samples.desc: another rising two-tone whistle, low to high

samples.name: pos-rising-03
samples.desc: one more rising two-tone whistle

samples.name: pos-falling-01
samples.desc: two-tone whistle going down — high, then low

samples.name: pos-falling-02
samples.desc: another falling two-tone whistle, high to low

samples.name: pos-falling-03
samples.desc: one more falling two-tone whistle

samples.name: pos-quiet-01
samples.desc: soft, quiet whistle — close to the mic

samples.name: pos-quiet-02
samples.desc: another soft whistle, close to the mic

samples.name: pos-quiet-03
samples.desc: one more soft, quiet whistle

samples.name: pos-far-01
samples.desc: whistle from a couple steps back — across the room

samples.name: pos-far-02
samples.desc: another whistle from across the room

samples.name: pos-far-03
